content: Phase 3: Extend analysis engine to support private-trip-aware segment splitting
Phase 3: Add manual private trip marking/confirmation UI and correction text updates
Phase 4: Implement username/password auth with seeded owner/admin account
Phase 4: Implement admin-only user management with soft deactivate RBAC
Phase 4: Protect analysis flow behind authentication
Phase 4: End-to-end testing using Testing Agent for private trip + RBAC flows
